/usr/bin/cc  -pg -O3 -DNDEBUG  -pg -pg CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/add.c.o CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/adi.c.o CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/bt.c.o CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/c_print_results.c.o CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/c_timers.c.o CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/error.c.o CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/exact_rhs.c.o CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/exact_solution.c.o CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/initialize.c.o CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/print_results.c.o CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/randdp.c.o CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/rhs.c.o CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/set_constants.c.o CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/solve_subs.c.o CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/verify.c.o CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/wtime.c.o CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/x_solve.c.o CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/y_solve.c.o CMakeFiles/npb_bt_c.dir/src/z_solve.c.o -o npb_bt_c  -lm
